name: Strawberry Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove hulls from berries. In a blender container, place berries, orange juice, milk, and 1/4 cup honey. Cover; blend 1 minute or till smooth.
2. If desired, strain the raspberry mixture to remove seeds. Pour mixture into a 9x9x2-inch pan. Cover; freeze 2 to 3 hours or till almost firm.
3. In a mixer bowl, beat egg whites with an electric mixer on medium speed until soft peaks form. Gradually add 1 tablespoon honey, beating on high speed until stiff peaks form.
4. Break the frozen mixture into chunks and transfer to a chilled large mixing bowl. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Fold in the egg whites. Return to pan. Cover; freeze 6 to 8 hours or till firm.
5. To serve, scrape across the frozen mixture with a spoon and mound in dessert dishes.
